summary: Signing is available for valid wrappers, but the API or method that rebuilds Resource after app-content changes is still missing.
questionForProduct: We can sign .yapk wrappers with /utils/apppackage/setsign, but how do we generate or rebuild the encrypted/opaque Resource after changing lists, fields, dashboards, or forms? Please provide the API or encoding method that turns modified app package JSON into a valid .yapk Resource.
currentStopRule: Do not generate or mutate app-content .yapk packages offline until Resource generation is product-supported or proven.
